items.title: Product Manager ChartCheck
items.jd_full: Please mention the word **UPGRADEABLE** and tag RMTM2LjEwNy4xMzQuMTU3 when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RMTM2LjEwNy4xMzQuMTU3). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.
